proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_078 (continuous, range 30-90) is positively correlated with pfs_months: higher values associated with longer pfs_months.
feature_057 (ordinal 0/1/2) is negatively associated with pfs_months: higher values associated with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with feature_051 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_051 = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r=0.7661, p=0. Strong positive correlation: each additional unit of feature_078 associates with substantially longer pfs_months.
Pearson r=-0.3516, p=0. Higher feature_057 strongly associated with shorter pfs_months.
Mean pfs_months: 3.703 (feature_051=1, n=27481) vs 5.055 (feature_051=0, n=22519). Difference -1.352 months, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_038 = 1 have longer mean pfs_months than patients with feature_038 = 0.
feature_099 (continuous, range 0-24.6) is negatively correlated with pfs_months.
feature_092 (continuous, range 1.5-5.5) is positively correlated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: 5.089 (feature_038=1, n=10022) vs 4.117 (feature_038=0, n=39978). Difference +0.972 months, p=1.71e-216.
Pearson r=-0.1229, p=2.21e-167. Higher feature_099 associated with shorter pfs_months.
Pearson r=0.1018, p=3.25e-115. Higher feature_092 associated with longer pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_013 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_013 = 0.
Patients with feature_043 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_043 = 0.
feature_009 (continuous, range 0.02-777, heavy-tailed) is negatively correlated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_013=1 mean 4.121 vs 0 mean 4.448, diff -0.327 months, p=1.86e-58.
feature_043=1 mean 4.114 vs 0 mean 4.419, diff -0.305 months, p=1.04e-49.
Pearson r=-0.0377, p=3.13e-17. Heavy-tailed; small but significant negative correlation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_109 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_109 = 0.
Patients with feature_067 = 1 have longer mean pfs_months than feature_067 = 0.
feature_006 (continuous, range 48-830) is negatively associated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_109=1 mean 4.094 vs 0 mean 4.322, diff -0.228, p=3.47e-07.
Pearson r=-0.0112, p=0.0126. Marginal negative correlation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_078 retains a positive association with pfs_months in a multivariable linear model adjusted for feature_057, feature_051, feature_038, feature_099, feature_092, feature_013, feature_043, feature_009, feature_109, feature_067 and feature_006.
feature_051 retains a negative association with pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.
feature_038 retains a positive association with pfs_months after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coef for feature_078 = +0.1758 months per unit, p=0.
Adjusted coef for feature_051 = -1.3616 months, p=0.
Adjusted coef for feature_038 = +0.9428 months, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across feature_064 categories (white, hispanic, black, asian, other).
Mean pfs_months is shorter for feature_064 = black compared with feature_064 = white.
Mean pfs_months differs between feature_064 = hispanic and feature_064 = white.

analyses.result_summary: ANOVA F=0.872, p=0.479. Group means: white=4.316, hispanic=4.315, asian=4.306, black=4.273, other=4.407
black mean 4.273 vs white mean 4.316, diff -0.042, p=0.189.
hispanic mean 4.315 vs white mean 4.316, diff -0.001, p=0.972.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across feature_018 categories (medicare, private, medicaid, uninsured).
Patients with feature_018 = uninsured have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_018 = private.
Patients with feature_018 = medicaid have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_018 = private.

analyses.result_summary: ANOVA F=1.475, p=0.219. Means: medicare=4.312, private=4.330, uninsured=4.249, medicaid=4.277
uninsured mean 4.249 vs private mean 4.330, diff -0.082, p=0.125.
medicaid mean 4.277 vs private mean 4.330, diff -0.053, p=0.098.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction term feature_051 x feature_038 is statistically significant: the negative effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs depending on feature_038.
Patients with feature_051 = 1 and feature_038 = 0 have the shortest mean pfs_months among the four feature_051 x feature_038 cells.
Patients with feature_051 = 0 and feature_038 = 1 have the longest mean pfs_months among the four feature_051 x feature_038 cells.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months for feature_051=1, feature_038=0 = 3.499; min across cells = 3.499.
Mean pfs_months for feature_051=0, feature_038=1 = 5.809; max across cells = 5.809.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_051 x feature_057 is significant: the (negative) effect of feature_051 on pfs_months varies across feature_057 levels (0/1/2).
Within feature_057 = 2 (highest level), feature_051 = 1 still produces shorter pfs_months than feature_051 = 0.
The negative pfs_months effect of feature_051 is largest in absolute magnitude in feature_057 = 0 patients (lowest stage-like level).

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_057=2: feature_051 effect = -1.270, p=4.4e-161 (n1=4101, n0=3336).
Stratum-specific feature_051 effect: feature_057=0: -1.401 (p=0), feature_057=1: -1.346 (p=0), feature_057=2: -1.270 (p=4.4e-161)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_038 x feature_057 is significant: the positive effect of feature_038 on pfs_months differs across feature_057 levels.
The benefit of feature_038 = 1 over feature_038 = 0 (in pfs_months) is largest in feature_057 = 2 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = +0.0047, p=0.892.
Stratum-specific feature_038 effect: feature_057=0: +0.925 (p=5.19e-76), feature_057=1: +0.995 (p=3.77e-122), feature_057=2: +0.896 (p=2.94e-34)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_078 x feature_051 is significant: the (negative) effect of feature_051 on pfs_months varies by feature_078 level.
Within the lowest tertile of feature_078, the negative effect of feature_051 = 1 on pfs_months is more pronounced than in the highest tertile.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.00712, p=1.9e-09.
By feature_078 tertile, feature_051 effect: T0: -1.284 (p=0), T1: -1.360 (p=0), T2: -1.396 (p=0)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_051 x feature_064 is jointly significant: the effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs by feature_064 (race).
Within feature_064 = black, feature_051 = 1 produces a larger negative pfs_months effect than within feature_064 = white.
The interaction feature_078 x feature_018 is jointly significant: the slope of pfs_months on feature_078 differs by insurance group.
Within feature_018 = uninsured, the positive correlation between feature_078 and pfs_months is weaker than within feature_018 = private.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(feature_078, pfs_months) by insurance: medicare: r=0.769, p=0, n=21105, private: r=0.762, p=0, n=19898, uninsured: r=0.773, p=0, n=2006, medicaid: r=0.768, p=0, n=6991

proposed_hypotheses.text: feature_051 effect on pfs_months differs in patients with feature_092 < 3.5 vs feature_092 >= 3.5 (interaction term significant).
Among patients with feature_092 < 3.5, the negative effect of feature_051 is larger in absolute magnitude than among patients with feature_092 >= 3.5.

analyses.result_summary: feature_051 effect among feature_092<3.5: -1.369; among >=3.5: -1.346.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of feature_038 = 1 on pfs_months differs in patients with feature_099 above vs below its median (interaction significant).
Among patients with feature_099 above the median, feature_038 = 1 still confers a positive pfs_months benefit.

analyses.result_summary: Within feature_099_high: feature_038 effect = +0.992.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_038 x feature_064 is jointly significant: the pfs_months benefit of feature_038 differs across racial groups.
Within every feature_064 group with sufficient sample size, the effect of feature_038 = 1 vs 0 on pfs_months remains positive.

analyses.result_summary: Stratum-specific feature_038 effect by race: white: +0.921 (p=4.77e-129), black: +0.971 (p=8.42e-28), hispanic: +1.114 (p=2.03e-41), asian: +1.090 (p=1.92e-18), other: +1.222 (p=1.65e-07)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_051 x feature_018 is jointly significant: the harmful effect of feature_051 on pfs_months differs by insurance.
Within feature_018 = uninsured, the negative effect of feature_051 = 1 on pfs_months is larger in magnitude than within feature_018 = private.

analyses.result_summary: Stratum-specific feature_051 effect by insurance: medicare: -1.331 (p=0), private: -1.357 (p=0), uninsured: -1.340 (p=2.93e-41), medicaid: -1.404 (p=4.6e-142)

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_057 x feature_064 is jointly significant: the negative slope of pfs_months on feature_057 differs across racial groups.
Within every feature_064 group, higher feature_057 levels are associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Pearson r(feature_057, pfs_months) by race: white: r=-0.353, p=0, black: r=-0.356, p=1.21e-178, hispanic: r=-0.351, p=9.58e-219, asian: r=-0.329, p=1.69e-76, other: r=-0.370, p=7.08e-33

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_078 x feature_038 is significant: the pfs_months benefit of feature_038 = 1 varies with feature_078.
The pfs_months benefit of feature_038 = 1 (vs 0) is larger in the highest tertile of feature_078 than in the lowest.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coef = -0.00172, p=0.28.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A combined burden score (feature_013 + feature_043) is monotonically negatively associated with pfs_months: more positive flags associate with shorter pfs_months.
Patients with feature_013 = 1 AND feature_043 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with feature_013 = 0 AND feature_043 = 0.

analyses.result_summary: Linear slope on burden score = -0.316 months per +1 flag, p=7.99e-100. Group means: burden=0: 4.622, burden=1: 4.133, burden=2: 4.094
burden=2 mean 4.094 vs burden=0 mean 4.622, diff -0.528, p=1.53e-65.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the 'bad labs' subgroup (feature_092 < 3.5 AND feature_099 above median) have shorter mean pfs_months than the rest of the cohort.
The 'bad labs' indicator remains a negative independent predictor of pfs_months after adjustment for feature_078, feature_051, feature_038, and feature_057.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coef for _bad_labs = -0.6283, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs between feature_007 = 1 and feature_007 = 0 patients in the overall cohort.
The effect of feature_051 = 1 (vs 0) on pfs_months differs between feature_007 = 1 and feature_007 = 0 patients (interaction term significant).

analyses.result_summary: feature_007=1 mean 4.308 vs 0 mean 4.314; diff -0.006, p=0.77.
Interaction feature_007:feature_051 coef = +0.0521, p=0.189.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The interaction feature_064 x feature_018 is jointly significant: race-related differences in pfs_months are not uniform across insurance categories.
The mean pfs_months for feature_064 = black AND feature_018 = uninsured is shorter than for feature_064 = white AND feature_018 = private.

analyses.code: joint F-test on feature_064:feature_018 interaction terms

analyses.result_summary: black/uninsured mean 4.1946593828924845; white/private mean 4.342.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for the top biomarker/treatment features (feature_078, feature_057, feature_051, feature_038, feature_013, feature_043, feature_109, feature_067, feature_092, feature_099, feature_009, feature_006) AND for feature_064 (race) and feature_018 (insurance), feature_064 = black is still associated with shorter pfs_months than feature_064 = white.
After the same multivariable adjustment, feature_018 = uninsured is still associated with shorter pfs_months than feature_018 = private.
feature_051 retains a clinically meaningful negative coefficient (more than -0.3 months) and significant p-value in this fully adjusted model.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coef C(feature_064)[T.black] = -0.0018, p=0.925.
Adjusted coef C(feature_018)[T.uninsured] = -0.0273, p=0.212.
Adjusted coef feature_051 = -1.3617, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with feature_089 = 1 have longer mean pfs_months than feature_089 = 0.
Patients with feature_102 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_102 = 0.
Patients with feature_112 = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than feature_112 = 0.
feature_028 (continuous, range 0.09-3.53) is negatively correlated with pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: feature_089=1 mean 4.396 vs 0 mean 4.304; diff +0.092, p=0.0171.
feature_102=1 mean 4.277 vs 0 mean 4.326; diff -0.049, p=0.0274.
feature_112=1 mean 4.273 vs 0 mean 4.322; diff -0.049, p=0.0458.
Pearson r=-0.0090, p=0.044. Small but significant negative correlation.
